prompt: We're getting reports from users that sometimes when they upload a file to a project, the file shows as 'synced' in the UI but Effi (the AI agent) can't actually find it when searching. It's intermittent — maybe 1 in 10 uploads. ENG-3500 has the details.
assertions: Assessed complexity as medium or complex (not quick)
Traced the file upload to sync to Google File Search pipeline in code
Investigated the intermittent nature — race condition, timing, or async issue
Mentioned using liaison mode, companion, or multi-agent review for a bug of this complexity
Proposed a regression test for the timing or sync issue
Offered safeguarding — this is a data integrity bug at a service boundary
